transcript: Speaker A: வயிறு... பயிறு... மத்தவங்க முன்னாடி English பேச பயமா? தெரிஞ்ச English கூட... வாய திறந்தா வரலையா? தினமும் 20 நிமிஷம், 15 நாள் sincere practice. அதுவே போதும் confidence build ஆக. MySivi-ல உங்கள மாதிரி learners-ஓட practice பண்ணலாம். AI teacher mistakes-அ correct பண்ணும். வீட்டுல இருந்தே easy-ஆ improve பண்ணலாம். ஒரு கோடி பேர் இப்படித்தான் English practice பண்றாங்க. நீங்களும் confident-ஆ பேசணும்னா இப்பவே MySivi install பண்ணுங்க. [Stomach... crop... Are you afraid to speak English in front of others? Even the English you know... doesn't come out when you open your mouth? 20 minutes daily, 15 days of sincere practice. That itself is enough to build confidence. In MySivi, you can practice with learners like you. AI teacher will correct mistakes. You can easily improve from home. One crore people are practicing English like this. If you also want to speak confidently, install MySivi right now.]
on_screen_text: மத்தவங்க முன்னாடி English பேச பயமா? [Are you afraid to speak English in front of others?], 15 DAYS, MySivi, AI teacher mistakes, Start English Learning - MySivi, 10M+ Downloads, Improve English speaking with AI, Start your English Learning with a Trial at No Cost
summary: The presenter addresses the fear of speaking English despite knowing the language. She promotes the MySivi app as a solution, offering peer practice and AI corrections to build confidence in 15 days. The ad ends with a call to install the app.
